meanings.definition: cancel, annul, or reverse an action or its effect
examples: I wish I could undo my actions

meanings.definition: cause the ruin or downfall of
examples: A single mistake undid the President and he had to resign

meanings.definition: remove the outer cover or wrapping of

examples: the work could be done or undone and nobody cared

meanings.definition: not fastened or tied or secured
examples: her blouse had come undone at the neck

meanings.definition: thrown into a state of disorganization or incoherence
examples: price programs became unstuck because little grain was available
